title: Break, continue, and return statements should not occur in finally blocks
description: Avoid using break, continue, and return statements within a finally block, as they may lead to unintended consequences.
message: Break, continue, or return statement found within a finally block.
recommendation: Refactor the code to remove the break, continue, or return statement from the finally block.
why_is_this_an_issue: Break, continue, and return statements can cause unintended consequences when used within a finally block, as they exit the try-finally block prematurely.
how_to_fix: Refactor the code to remove the break, continue, or return statement from the finally block.
